entity_name: Top 25 Contract Manufacturing Companies in Georgia
facts: Georgia's contract manufacturing sector provides specialized production services across electronics, pharmaceuticals, packaging, and metal fabrication to support regional supply chains.
There is a strong push towards reshoring manufacturing activities in Georgia to improve quality control and supply chain reliability.
Contract manufacturing firms in the state range from fewer than 50 employees to larger operations with up to 5,000 staff members.
Printed Circuits Corp operates a 32,000 square foot facility in Lilburn for PCB assembly and serves aerospace, medical, and industrial sectors.
Prime Technological Services operates a 50,000 square foot facility in Suwanee equipped with robotics and automation for high-mix, high-complexity projects.
Central One provides plastic injection molding and PCBA services to the automotive industry among others from its Fayetteville location.
Ankerpak operates 240,000 square feet across 18 acres near Atlanta and has transitioned manufacturing operations from overseas back to the United States.
GRI received $120.0 million in funding in September 2024 and expanded capabilities with a new facility in Alabama.
East West Manufacturing secured $76.9 million in funding in January 2022 to enhance manufacturing capabilities from its Atlanta headquarters.
Endeavor 3D serves the automotive sector using Multi Jet Fusion and Metal Jet 3D printing technologies for on-demand production in Douglasville.
i-Tech e-Services operates three complete SMT lines for high-mix PCB assembly in Norcross and serves clients like Panasonic USA and Georgia Power.
CJB Industries provides chemical manufacturing and packaging solutions to the automotive sector from its Valdosta facility.
Oneda Corporation serves the automotive industry with precision metal stamping, holds IATF 16949 certification, and received a $252,000 grant in October 2023.
Peliton operates a 35,000 square foot facility in Valdosta and reflects the growing trend of reshoring production to the USA for quality and IP security.
Southern Metalcraft ships over one million quality parts annually and has completed more than 15,000 orders from its Lithonia location.
Printed Circuits Corp is a private electronics manufacturer established in 2000 with a workforce of 11-50 employees and certified under AS9100D and ISO 9001:2015.
Prime Technological Services was established in 1989, has a workforce of approximately 201-500 employees, and has expanded through strategic acquisitions.
Central One was founded in 2010, employs 11 to 50 people, and holds ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 13485 certifications.
Ankerpak was founded in 2003, serves clients from local entrepreneurs to Fortune 500 companies, and emphasizes material sourcing and comprehensive logistics solutions.
Engent, Inc. was founded in 2002, employs 1001-5000 people, and specializes in electronic failure analysis and product testing.
Mfg.com connects buyers with manufacturers for custom parts and contract manufacturing services globally, offering CNC machining, injection molding, 3D printing, and sheet metal fabrication.
GRI emphasizes sustainability through eco-conscious manufacturing practices and holds a workforce distributed across the United States, Dominican Republic, and China.
Recro employs approximately 144 people and specializes in clinical trial services, cGMP manufacturing, and formulation development for injectables, oral liquids, and oral solids.
Elevate Solutions Group incorporates recycled materials and focuses on waste reduction as part of its sustainability initiatives.
East West Manufacturing operates in the United States, Costa Rica, Canada, Mexico, and Vietnam, providing onshore, nearshore, and offshore manufacturing solutions.
Endeavor 3D employs approximately 27 people and utilizes advanced technologies for efficient and cost-effective production of high-quality parts.
i-Tech e-Services manufactures wiring harnesses and cable assemblies tailored to client specifications and is certified under AS9100D and ISO 13485.
Metcam, Inc. employs lean practices to reduce waste and enhance efficiency, offering just-in-time delivery and inventory support for OEMs.
CJB Industries offers liquid and solid formulation, chemical packaging, and supply chain support, equipped with state-of-the-art technology for small and large production runs.
Cable Quest emphasizes quality and customer service, offering value-added services such as documentation and testing for custom cable assemblies.
Oneda Corporation has over 60 years of combined industry experience among its workforce and maintains a commitment to timely delivery.
Pharma Tech Industries operates under stringent quality standards ensuring compliance with cGMP regulations and serves both established pharmaceutical corporations and emerging wellness brands.
PPI implements practices that reduce energy consumption and waste while fostering partnerships that enhance manufacturing processes.
Advanced Metal Components, Inc. provides metal fabrication, powder coating, and assembly services supported by CNC lasers and punching centers.
Peliton offers project management services to coordinate with external tooling shops and helps industrial designers and inventors bring products to market efficiently.
Summit Packaging Solutions has established multiple locations across the United States, including facilities in Kentucky, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Georgia.
Southern Metalcraft has successfully completed more than 15,000 orders and ships over a million quality parts annually.
Stronghaven operates as Hood Container Corporation focusing on containerboard, kraft paper, and various packaging solutions for food, beverage, pharmaceuticals, and electronics.
